name: haproxy_backend_active_servers
definition: Number of active servers (backend) or active flag (server scope)
absence_means: Optional metric disabled or role not exporting active state
cardinality_footguns: Scope differences require careful aggregation

name: haproxy_backend_backup_servers
definition: Number of backup servers or backup flag at server scope
absence_means: Optional metric disabled or no backup pool configured
cardinality_footguns: Backup count alone does not prove failover readiness

name: haproxy_backend_client_aborts_total
definition: Client-aborted data transfers often tied to client timeout behavior
absence_means: Optional metric disabled or no client aborts
cardinality_footguns: Can spike from client deploys independent of backend health

name: haproxy_backend_downtime_seconds_total
definition: Cumulative downtime seconds for backend or server
absence_means: No downtime accumulation in selected window
cardinality_footguns: Cumulative metric should be viewed as increase/rate not raw absolute only

name: haproxy_backend_status
definition: PROMEX backend status gauge (up/down semantics by exporter mapping)
absence_means: PROMEX not enabled or backend status filtered out
cardinality_footguns: Status encoding must be verified before thresholds

name: haproxy_server_check_failures_total
definition: Failed health checks while server reported up
absence_means: No recent failed checks or optional metric disabled
cardinality_footguns: Misses complete-down states if interpreted alone

name: haproxy_server_status
definition: PROMEX server status gauge per server target
absence_means: Server status metric absent or scope filtered
cardinality_footguns: Server labels can become high-cardinality with templates

name: haproxy_backend_current_queue
definition: Current queued requests without server assignment indicating pressure
absence_means: No queue pressure or metric disabled
cardinality_footguns: Interpretation depends on receiver temporality mapping; verify in Stage 2

name: haproxy_backend_weight
definition: Effective backend/server weight for load-balancing decisions
absence_means: Optional metric disabled or static config not exposing weights
cardinality_footguns: Weight interpretation differs by algorithm and role

name: haproxy_frontend_connections_total
definition: Cumulative frontend connections accepted
absence_means: Optional metric disabled or no frontend traffic
cardinality_footguns: Can be redundant with sessions if mixed families are plotted together

name: haproxy_frontend_current_sessions
definition: Current in-flight sessions and main concurrency pressure signal
absence_means: No active sessions or telemetry path missing
cardinality_footguns: Proxy name churn can create noisy top-lists

name: haproxy_frontend_limit_sessions
definition: Configured session limit used as denominator for utilization
absence_means: Limit not exported by current role/receiver config
cardinality_footguns: Limit differs by frontend/backend and can mislead global averages

name: haproxy_process_current_connections
definition: PROMEX process-level current connection count for global HAProxy pressure
absence_means: Global process metric unavailable or scope filtered
cardinality_footguns: Process metric may not map cleanly to per-backend incidents

name: haproxy_backend_connection_errors_total
definition: Connection attempts that failed while reaching backend servers
absence_means: Backend connect path currently healthy or metric disabled
cardinality_footguns: Needs pairing with timeout/retry signals for diagnosis

name: haproxy_backend_http_responses_total
definition: Backend HTTP responses by code class; used for 5xx ratio and response distribution.
absence_means: Backend response-class metrics are missing or exporter scope excludes response labels.
cardinality_footguns: Use response code classes not raw status labels for stable Top-N.

name: haproxy_backend_redispatch_warnings_total
definition: Requests redispatched to alternate servers after initial selection
absence_means: No redispatch events in window
cardinality_footguns: High redispatch with retries indicates unstable pool

name: haproxy_backend_response_errors_total
definition: Cumulative response-path errors including aborted server responses
absence_means: No response-path errors in window
cardinality_footguns: May include server abort semantics not only proxy faults

name: haproxy_backend_retry_warnings_total
definition: Connection retries while reaching backend servers
absence_means: No retries observed or retry logic disabled
cardinality_footguns: Retry spikes can amplify backend load

name: haproxy_frontend_request_errors_total
definition: Cumulative request-path errors including malformed/processing failures
absence_means: No request-path errors in window
cardinality_footguns: Can reflect client issues rather than backend outage

name: haproxy_frontend_requests_denied_total
definition: Requests denied by policy/security logic
absence_means: No deny events or policy path disabled
cardinality_footguns: Can be expected policy behavior not outage

name: haproxy_frontend_responses_denied_total
definition: Responses denied by policy/security logic
absence_means: No deny events or policy path disabled
cardinality_footguns: Interpret with config change context to avoid false incidents

name: haproxy_backend_connect_time_average_seconds
definition: Average connect time over recent sample window
absence_means: Optional metric disabled or no connect attempts
cardinality_footguns: Interpret with connection errors/timeouts to isolate path issue

name: haproxy_backend_queue_time_average_seconds
definition: Average queue time over recent sample window
absence_means: Optional metric disabled or no sampled requests
cardinality_footguns: Queue average should be correlated with queued requests for interpretation

name: haproxy_backend_response_time_average_seconds
definition: Average response time over recent sample window
absence_means: Optional metric disabled or no sampled responses
cardinality_footguns: Average can hide long-tail spikes under mixed traffic

name: haproxy_backend_total_time_average_seconds
definition: Average total session time over recent sample window
absence_means: No sampled sessions in interval
cardinality_footguns: Average is not percentile and can mask tails

name: haproxy_backend_http_requests_total
definition: PROMEX backend HTTP request volume by backend label
absence_means: PROMEX not enabled or backend scope filtered out
cardinality_footguns: Cardinality rises with many dynamic backends

name: haproxy_backend_loadbalanced_total
definition: Number of times a server was selected for sessions or redispatch
absence_means: No selection events in selected window
cardinality_footguns: Can overlap with request totals depending on protocol mix

name: haproxy_frontend_bytes_in_total
definition: Inbound bytes received by HAProxy
absence_means: No inbound traffic or metric disabled
cardinality_footguns: Can double-count with multiple telemetry families

name: haproxy_frontend_bytes_out_total
definition: Outbound bytes sent by HAProxy
absence_means: No outbound traffic or metric disabled
cardinality_footguns: Byte counters can spike on retransmit-heavy conditions

name: haproxy_frontend_current_session_rate
definition: Sessions per second gauge used for ingress load and burst detection
absence_means: No session-producing traffic or metric disabled
cardinality_footguns: High-card grouping by address/service combinations can clutter charts

name: haproxy_frontend_http_requests_rate_max
definition: HTTP requests per second over recent elapsed second gauge
absence_means: Frontend traffic not present or metric disabled
cardinality_footguns: Grouping by raw address may explode

name: haproxy_frontend_http_requests_total
definition: Total HTTP requests received and response-class split foundation for traffic and error rates
absence_means: Frontend request totals unavailable due exporter scope or ingest outage
cardinality_footguns: Use proxy-level grouping; avoid address-level fanout in overview

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: HAProxy telemetry does not expose direct cloud billing; cost dashboards require external billing datasets and can use throughput plus session utilization as proxy drivers
absence_means: Cost metrics require separate billing/export pipelines
cardinality_footguns: Safe
